jobPostingInfo.title: Intern, SAP BTP Application Development
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Location: San Jose, CA - Hybrid 4/days, Friday remote

Job Summary:

Semtech is looking for a motivated intern to support our IT team in the development and deployment of applications on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). This is a hands-on opportunity to gain practical experience in enterprise application development within a global semiconductor company.

Responsibilities

  • Assist in the development and testing of applications on SAP BTP
  • Support configuration and integration tasks within the SAP BTP environment
  • Document technical processes and development activities
  • Collaborate with team members to troubleshoot and resolve application issues
  • Participate in team meetings and contribute to project discussions

Minimum Qualifications

  • Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field
  • Basic understanding of programming concepts (JavaScript, Java, or Python a plus)
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Preferred Qualifications

  • Familiarity with SAP BTP or other SAP products
  • Experience with cloud platforms or web application development
  • Knowledge of REST APIs or integration concepts
  • Prior internship or project experience in an enterprise IT environment

The intent of this job description is to describe the major duties and responsibilities performed by incumbents of this job. Incumbents may be required to perform job-related tasks other than those specifically included in this description.

All duties and responsibilities are essential job functions and requirements and are subject to possible modification to reasonably accommodate individuals with disabilities.

We are proud to be an EEO employer M/F/D/V. We maintain a drug-free workplace.

A reasonable estimate of the pay range for this position is $23/hr - $31/hr. There are several factors taken into consideration in determining base salary, including but not limited to: job-related qualifications, skills, education and experience, as well as job location and the value of other elements of an employee’s total compensation package.

#LI-Hybrid
